steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We need to find the value of $a$ where $f(a) = 16$. Substituting into the function $f(x) = \frac{x+11}{3}$:
$$\frac{a+11}{3} = 16$$

steps.title: Test choice C
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice C (37):
$$f(37) = \frac{37+11}{3} = \frac{48}{3} = 16$$
This equals 16, confirming the condition is satisfied. That is the correct answer.
